description_long: This object is a compact, pastel green keyboard with a set of black and white piano-style keys on its front face. The body features a bellows-like section in the middle, suggesting it is a small accordion or melodica-style keyboard instrument. Three round, cream-colored knobs are positioned on the top panel, likely for controlling sound or airflow. The rear side is curved and smooth, with no visible keys or controls. The overall design is simple and toy-like, with soft, rounded edges and a matte finish. The color palette is muted, dominated by light green with accents of white, black, and cream.
description: A small, pastel green keyboard with piano-style keys, bellows in the center, and three cream knobs on top. Its design is compact, rounded, and toy-like.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black and white piano keys and the top-mounted cream knobs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bellows section and the angled profile of the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, curved back with no visible keys or controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the bellows and the three knobs on the top panel.
